positioning: doctor-formulated Ayurvedic obesity and weight-loss system
structured guided protocol, not a loose supplement
not a standalone fat-burner claim product
promise_claims: 3 to 5 kg in 15 days when protocol is followed
primary_goal: reduce obesity and excess body weight through practical adherence
on_image_copy_requirements: Headlines and subheadlines must explicitly mention weight loss, obesity reduction, or direct weight outcome language.
Do not use abstract lines that hide the product goal.
protocol: night tablet plus 1/2 tsp powder before sleep
diet: allowed: vegetables, salads, soups, fruits, up to 30g millets/oats if still hungry
restricted: non-veg, alcohol, dairy except milk in tea/coffee, wheat chapati, rice, dal, nuts
safety: internal line: first 3 days may be adjustment phase
refund: 7-day refund if weight loss does not start
conditions: follow protocol and share daily tracker
